ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* A unique username for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address for communication */,
  "race" TEXT /* Types of cannabis strains used by the user (e.g., sativa, indica, hybrid) */,
  "flavors" TEXT /* List of flavors experienced by the user when using the strain */,
  "positive_effects" TEXT /* Positive effects reported by the user */,
  "negative_effects" TEXT /* Negative effects reported by the user */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions the user has that may be affected by cannabis use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (city, state, country) */,
  "preferred_usage_type" TEXT /* Whether the user prefers recreational or medicinal use */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the cannabis strain */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of strain (e.g., sativa, indica, hybrid) */,
  "flavors" TEXT /* Typical flavors associated with the strain */,
  "average_thc" REAL /* Average THC content in the strain */,
  "average_cbd" REAL /* Average CBD content in the strain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strain was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strain's information was last updated */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Place of origin of the strain */,
  "breeder" TEXT /* Name of the breeder or company that developed the strain */,
  "cbd_to_thc_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of CBD to THC content in the strain */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_strain_experiences" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user experience log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user documenting their experience */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain being logged */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experience */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating of the strain from 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments regarding their experience with the strain */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cannabis session in minutes */,
  "consumption_method" TEXT /* Method of consumption (e.g., smoking, vaping, edibles) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage amount consumed */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the effects (e.g., mild, moderate, strong) */,
  "immediate_effects" TEXT /* Immediate effects experienced after consumption */,
  "long_term_effects" TEXT /* Long-term effects experienced after consumption */,
  "recommended_for" TEXT /* Conditions or situations for which the strain is recommended */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any side effects experienced */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strain_experiences_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strain_experiences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavors" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor */,
  "flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flavor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flavor was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flavor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect (e.g., euphoric, relaxed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effect and its commonality */,
  "positive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the effect is positive */,
  "negative" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the effect is negative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition and its common symptoms */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
